debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
bound2 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2
abs_int_le_int_abs : ∀ {t : ℝ}, 0 ≤ t → |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|

proof:
apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact continuous_abs.comp (by fun_prop)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.comp (g := fun t => ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|) _ continuous_id
      exact intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (continuous_abs.comp g''_cont) · ·) 0
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable

      exact g''_cont.comp continuous_snd
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply continuous_parametric_intervalIntegral_of_continuous
      exact (continuous_abs.comp g''_cont).comp continuous_snd
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable

    · intro t ht

    · intro t ht

    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply continuous_parametric_intervalIntegral_of_continuous
      · exact continuous_abs.comp g''_cont
      · exact isCompact_Icc
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.abs (by continuity)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegral (u := fun _ => 0) (v := fun t => t)
      · exact Continuous.abs g''_cont
      · exact continuous_const
      · exact continuous_id
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegral _ continuous_const

    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact continuous_abs.comp (by continuity)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.comp (f := fun t => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|)
      · exact continuous_id
      · exact intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (continuous_abs.comp g''_cont) 0) 0
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_of_nonneg
    · apply ae_of_all
      intro t
      exact abs_nonneg _
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.comp (f := fun t => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|)
      · exact continuous_id
      · apply intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive
        · intro a b
          exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (Continuous.abs g''_cont) a b
        · exact 0
    · apply ae_of_all
      intro t
      by_cases ht : 0 ≤ t
      · exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht
      · push_neg at ht
        calc |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s|
            = |-(∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, g'' s)| := by rw [intervalIntegral.integral_symm]
            _ = |∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, g'' s| := abs_neg _
            _ ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s| := intervalIntegral.abs_integral_le_integral_abs (le_of_lt ht)
            _ = -(∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) := by rw [intervalIntegral.integral_symm]
            _ ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by
              rw [intervalIntegral.integral_symm 0 t]
              have : ∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s| ≥ 0 := by
                apply intervalIntegral.integral_nonneg (le_of_lt ht)
                intro u _
                exact abs_nonneg _
              linarith

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact continuous_abs.comp (by fun_prop)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.comp (g := fun t => ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|)
      · exact continuous_id
      · exact intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (continuous_abs.comp g''_cont) 0) 0
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_of_nonneg
    · exact ae_of_all _ (fun t => abs_nonneg _)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.comp (f := fun t => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|)
      · exact continuous_id
      · exact intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) · ·) 0
    · apply ae_of_all _
      intro t
      by_cases ht : 0 ≤ t
      · exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht
      · push_neg at ht
        have : t ≤ 0 := le_of_lt ht
        rw [intervalIntegral.integral_symm 0 t, intervalIntegral.integral_symm 0 t]
        rw [abs_neg]
        have h1 : |∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s| := by
          exact intervalIntegral.abs_integral_le_integral_abs this
        linarith

      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1
